Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges provided, we can scan each edge and collect the time t whenever node 0 and node 3 are connected. We will first find the earliest time t when node 0 and node 3 are connected, and then we will find the latest time t when node 0 and node 3 are disconnected.

The earliest time t when node 0 and node 3 are connected is 1, as there is an edge (0, 3, 1) in the graph.
The latest time t when node 0 and node 3 are disconnected is 26, as there is an edge (0, 3, 26) in the graph.

Therefore, the answer is:

Answer: 1
